name: DSVW (Damn Small Vulnerable Web)
description: Single 98-line Python web app with 26 labeled vulnerabilities. Tests data-flow analysis through a connected application — tainted HTTP params flow into SQL queries, subprocess, pickle, exec, file open.
format: Single Python file (dsvw.py). Vulnerabilities enumerated in the CASES tuple with descriptions and OWASP links.
WARNING: DO NOT EXECUTE — this is a deliberately vulnerable web server. Parse as text only.
